name: Chocolate Gumdrop Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave morsels in 1 quart casserole until melted. Stir halfway through cooking time.
2. Spread 3/4 of the chocolate on waxed paper in a 9" X 6" rectangle.
3. Top with marshmallows, gumdrops and nuts.
4. Drizzle remaining chocolate over top.
5. Chill and cut into squares.
